summary: The Docker build failed because a `wget` command inside the Dockerfile could not download the nydus binary from GitHub, receiving an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error. This caused the `buildx bake` command to fail with exit code 1.
root_cause: A transient network error (HTTP 502 Bad Gateway) from GitHub prevented the wget download of the nydus static binary at https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz during the Docker build step.

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: This is the direct error from wget showing a transient network failure when connecting to GitHub to download the nydus binary.

evidence.quote: #72 ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This confirms the wget process failed with exit code 1 due to the 502 error, causing the Docker build step to fail.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This is the final GitHub Actions error annotation confirming the buildx bake command failed due to the wget network error.
This identifies the exact Dockerfile line (line 336) that triggered the failure.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job, as this is a transient network failure (HTTP 502 from GitHub). If the issue persists, consider adding retry logic to the wget command in Dockerfile line 336 (e.g., `wget --retry-connrefused --tries=3`) or mirroring the nydus release artifact to a more reliable host.
